"Postgres query exectution error (ProgrammingError): (psycopg2.errors.UndefinedFunction) operator does not exist: text - text
LINE 1: ...handled_cases, AVG(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (closeddate - createdd...
                                                             ^
HINT:  No operator matches the given name and argument types. You might need to add explicit type casts.

[SQL: SELECT ownerid AS agent_id, COUNT(*) AS handled_cases, AVG(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (closeddate - createddate))) AS avg_handle_time_seconds FROM "Case" WHERE createddate >= DATE '2023-05-02' AND closeddate IS NOT NULL AND id IN (SELECT caseid__c FROM casehistory__c WHERE field__c = 'Owner' GROUP BY caseid__c HAVING COUNT(*) = 1) GROUP BY ownerid HAVING COUNT(*) > 1 ORDER BY avg_handle_time_seconds ASC LIMIT 1;]
(Background on this error at: https://sqlalche.me/e/20/f405)"
